meaning: 帕里库廷火山[墨西哥米却肯州西部]
examples: They hurried across the shaking earth to the village of Paricutin, which was near their farm.
Most of the world's volcanoes were formed several million years ago. (3) The earth's newest volcano is located near Paricutin, Mexico.
They went as close to the fire as possible and stayed there for several days, studying the new volcano which people now call Paricutin, after the village.
